title: Turn-Taking Tower
description: A cooperative block tower game where spoken turn narration helps kids practice waiting and shared building.
interactionModel: build-assemble ordered drag or tap-tap block placement with turn narration
feedbackModel: Correct next blocks pop, sparkle, and speak a turn line; out-of-order blocks wiggle gently with a waiting nudge. Finished towers celebrate shared building.
credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder block art only. Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
